name: Four-Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 slices French Bread (3/4 inch thick), toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice all onions to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium-low heat, sauté onions and garlic in butter for 15 minutes or until tender and golden brown, stirring occasionally.
3. Add beef broth, beef consomme, worcestershire sauce, and nutmeg; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of Swiss cheese into the bottom of six oven-proof bowls.
6. Ladle hot soup into bowls.
7. Top each bowl with a slice of toasted French bread.
8. Sprinkle remaining Swiss cheese and Parmesan cheese over the top, if desired.
9. Broil until the cheese melts. Serve immediately.
